calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Janet espy appearing via zoom for and with Steven Atkins (executor).
Jeffrey Fleisher appearing via zoom in pro per (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the inventory of the estate and selling of the property at below market values, that a chandelier sent to Mr. Fleisher was damaged, and that the petitioner was requesting extraordinary fees for $20,000.00 at $500.00 an hour but no timesheets have been provided to the Courts. Petition to remove executor and his attorney is taken under submission with the intent to deny. Petition for final distribution etc., is taken under submission with the intent to grant except for extraordinary fees.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Executor Steven Tarbes Atkins And His Attorney Janet Espey
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Denied

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

Petition By Executor To Determine Entitlement To Property And For Order Directing Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Mar-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey appeared by zoom for and with Steven Atkins (Executor) by zoom.

Mrs. Espey spoke as to efforts made in locating a trust and stated that there is no more information. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Property, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. The court finds that the trust referred to in the annuity did not exist at the time of death and confirms that the subject annuity is an asset of the estate.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey, via ZOOM, for Steven Tarbes Atkins, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with counsel that the signature date of the will is 6/14/2021. The court then confirms with counsel that the sole heirs of the decedent are the decedent's brother and the three children of his predeceased sister. Counsel then confirms the following: that all medical bills have been covered by Medicare; the proposed Executor has contacted all medical facilities to inquire regarding any outstanding balances; the additional creditor resides in New York State; and that she does not object to the court ordering a bond on the amount of $30,000.

After additional discussion, and no appearances to object, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 6/14/2021 is admitted to probate. Steven Tarbes Atkins is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $30,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for 10/18/2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
